common_words.tu: second person singular subject pronoun (you, familiar)
common_words.você: second person singular subject pronoun (you, formal)
common_words.ele: third person masculine singular subject pronoun (he)
common_words.ela: third person feminine singular subject pronoun (she)
common_words.vós: second person plural subject pronoun (you, archaic/formal)
common_words.eles: third person masculine plural subject pronoun (they)
common_words.elas: third person feminine plural subject pronoun (they)
common_words.me: first person singular direct/indirect object pronoun (me)
common_words.te: second person singular direct/indirect object pronoun (you)
common_words.lhe: third person singular indirect object pronoun (to him/her/it)
common_words.lhes: third person plural indirect object pronoun (to them)
common_words.nos: first person plural direct/indirect object pronoun (us)
common_words.vos: second person plural direct/indirect object pronoun (you, archaic)
common_words.o_pronoun: third person masculine singular direct object pronoun (him/it)
common_words.a_pronoun: third person feminine singular direct object pronoun (her/it)
common_words.os_pronoun: third person masculine plural direct object pronoun (them)
common_words.as_pronoun: third person feminine plural direct object pronoun (them)

grammatical_particles.o: definite article or direct object pronoun
grammatical_particles.a: preposition, definite article, or direct object pronoun
grammatical_particles.do: contraction of de + o (of the/from the)
grammatical_particles.da: contraction of de + a (of the/from the)
grammatical_particles.dos: contraction of de + os (of the/from the)
grammatical_particles.das: contraction of de + as (of the/from the)
grammatical_particles.no: contraction of em + o (in the/on the)
grammatical_particles.na: contraction of em + a (in the/on the)
grammatical_particles.nos: contraction of em + os (in the/on the)
grammatical_particles.nas: contraction of em + as (in the/on the)
grammatical_particles.à: contraction of a + a (to the - feminine)
grammatical_particles.pelo: contraction of por + o (by the/through the)
grammatical_particles.pela: contraction of por + a (by the/through the)
grammatical_particles.pelos: contraction of por + os (by the/through the)
grammatical_particles.pelas: contraction of por + as (by the/through the)

verb_constructions.ter_auxiliary: auxiliary verb for perfect tenses (to have)
verb_constructions.ser_auxiliary: auxiliary verb for passive voice (to be)
verb_constructions.estar_auxiliary: auxiliary verb for progressive constructions (to be)
verb_constructions.ir_future: semi-auxiliary for near future (to be going to)
verb_constructions.vir_recent_past: semi-auxiliary for recent past (to come from)
verb_constructions.estar_a_infinitive: periphrasis for ongoing action - European Portuguese (to be - ing)
verb_constructions.se_reflexive: reflexive pronoun for reflexive/middle voice verbs
verb_constructions.se_reciprocal: reflexive pronoun for reciprocal action (each other)
